calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-20-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-23-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Gina Gonzales, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bank of the West.
Order to waive appearance of witness at prove-up hearing is on file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Potenti Construction Co., Inc., as follows:
Damages/Principal $228,356.37
Prejudgment Interest $7,502.20
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $394.50, for a total of $238,753.07.
Judgment signed in open court.
